title: potentilla × amthoris
intro: Potentilla × fruticosa is a hybrid of the potentilla species, commonly known as Cinquefoil or Silver Cinquefoil. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Potentilla × fruticosa include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as a natural antiseptic. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat skin conditions and promote wound healing.
